Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.PersonCourseRank

Information about how the course should be sorted. The course with lowest rank will be sorted first in the collection. If two courses has the same rank the date the rank was set will apply.

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
CourseId

The courseId the rank belongs to.

 integer

None.
Rank

The sort order rank. The one with lowest rank will be sorted first in the collection

 integer

None.
